task_completion.description: Verify the conditions CSV file was created with the correct GAD-7 items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, spreadsheet application, or terminal output showing the creation of 'gad7_items.csv' containing the 7 specified GAD-7 items.

task_completion.description: Verify the PsychoPy experiment is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the PsychoPy Builder window title showing 'gad7_assessment' or a file manager showing 'gad7_assessment.psyexp' in the /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the demographics collection is configured for 'Patient ID' and 'Date'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the PsychoPy 'Experiment Settings' dialog under the 'Basic' or 'Experiment Info' tab showing fields for 'Patient ID' and 'Date', or a specific demographics routine in the Flow panel.

task_completion.description: Verify a question routine loops through the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the PsychoPy Flow panel showing a loop (e.g., 'trials') around a question routine. The Loop Properties dialog should show 'gad7_items.csv' loaded in the 'Conditions' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the slider component is configured with the correct ticks and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Slider Component Properties dialog in PsychoPy. The 'Ticks' field should be '0, 1, 2, 3' (or similar integer list) and the 'Labels' field should contain 'Not at all', 'Several days', 'More than half the days', 'Nearly every day'.

task_completion.description: Verify the experiment runs successfully and saves data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the PsychoPy Runner window showing successful execution logs (e.g., 'Experiment ended'), the actual experiment window displaying the slider interface, or a file manager showing a 'data' folder with newly generated CSV/log files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, configuring components) rather than just writing a raw .psyexp XML/JSON file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the experiment was actually run through PsychoPy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the PsychoPy Runner window or the actual full-screen/windowed experiment running, rather than just a terminal command that mocks a success message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the conditions file for the loop rather than hardcoding all 7 questions into separate routines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Flow panel should show a single question routine enclosed in a loop, not 7 distinct question routines placed sequentially.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CSV path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/gad7_items.csv and the experiment path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/gad7_assessment.psyexp. The 7 GAD-7 items are: 'Feeling nervous, anxious or on edge', 'Not being able to stop or control worrying', 'Worrying too much about different things', 'Trouble relaxing', 'Being so restless that it is hard to sit still', 'Becoming easily annoyed or irritable', and 'Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen'. The slider must have ticks [0, 1, 2, 3] and labels 'Not at all', 'Several days', 'More than half the days', 'Nearly every day'.
